subject: Mozi Minute: Revenue Escape Velocity
body:
Words I like: WOM > Churn = Endless Growth

Mozi Minute: Revenue Escape Velocity

Most subscription businesses fight an uphill battle every month.

They're bleeding customers faster than they're gaining them through referrals and organic growth.

This creates a dependency on paid acquisition that never ends. Smart businesses flip this equation.

Escape velocity = when your % word-of-mouth growth exceeds your % churn rate consistently.

Here's the math that changes everything:

Monthly churn rate: 5%

Monthly word-of-mouth/organic growth rate: 3%

Result: 3% - 5% → You're shrinking by 2% monthly despite marketing efforts

Flip it:

Monthly churn rate: 3%

Monthly word-of-mouth growth rate: 5%

Result: 5% - 3% → You're growing by 2% monthly without any other advertising.

The magic happens when word-of-mouth exceeds churn.

Your business becomes self-sustaining.

Marketing becomes optional instead of essential.

Growth compounds naturally.

How to reach escape velocity:

1. Reduce churn through better onboarding and customer success.

2. Increase referrals by systematically asking satisfied customers.

3. Improve product quality so customers can't help but talk about you.

4. Create shareable moments in your customer experience.

Pro Tip:

Track both percentages monthly. Most businesses only track churn.

The winners obsess over word-of-mouth rate just as much.

Example: If 100 customers refer 1 person each over 12 months, that's 8.3% monthly word-of-mouth growth.

If your churn is 5%, you're growing 3.3% monthly without spending a dollar on ads.

Once you hit escape velocity, paid marketing becomes rocket fuel instead of life support.

As promised, value in under a minute.

Make WOM > churn,

Alex
